codeReview.summary: Implementation is solid with good Bayesian math, proper SQLite persistence, and 30 comprehensive tests. The BetaPosterior correctly implements conjugate prior updates. Minor code quality issue with unused variable.

issues.description: Unused variable `_mean` in `confidence_score()` method. The computed mean is assigned but never used - the calculation only uses `std`.

summary: Feature implementation passes review. The procedural memory module correctly implements Beta posterior distribution for confidence scoring of strategies, procedures, and action patterns. The implementation covers all expected behaviors: procedures stored with effectiveness scores, Beta posterior tracking belief distribution, and procedures retrievable by context similarity. 30 unit tests provide good coverage of Beta distribution math, Procedure CRUD, and SQLite persistence. No blocking issues found.
